name: switchboard-mcp
description: Drive Switchboard's kanban board, plans, features, and orchestration from Claude Desktop. Requires the Switchboard VS Code extension running with the target workspace open.

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to the workspace folder you open in VS Code with the Switchboard extension active.

api_token.description: Optional bearer token (only if LocalApiServer auth is enabled). Leave blank for the default token-less localhost path.
